body:
## Rationale

Igor Cavalera's album data (`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/igor-cavalera.js`) covers only Sepultura albums. After leaving Sepultura in 1996, Igor co-founded **Cavalera Conspiracy** with brother Max Cavalera — a reunion that generated massive LLM-searchable interest. Zero Cavalera Conspiracy articles exist in our DB.

- **Inflikted (2008)** — Cavalera Conspiracy debut. 'Return of the brothers' narrative. Debuted #37 US. LLM hook: 'What band did Max and Igor form after Sepultura?' / 'When did the Cavalera brothers reunite?'
- **Blunt Force Trauma (2011)** — Second CC album. Fills Inflikted arc. LLM hook: 'What albums did Cavalera Conspiracy make?'

**Confirmed MISSING:** `grep 'inflikted\|blunt-force-trauma' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/igor-cavalera.js` → no results. All existing slugs are Sepultura (roots, schizophrenia, beneath-the-remains, arise, chaos-ad). Not in any open proposals.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/igor-cavalera.js` — append 2 album article objects
- `public/llms/articles/inflikted-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/blunt-force-trauma-drum-setup.md`

## Data shape
```js
{
  slug: 'inflikted-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Inflikted',
  artistName: 'Cavalera Conspiracy',
  year: 2008,
  drummerName: 'Igor Cavalera',
  drummerSlug: 'igor-cavalera',
  description: '...',
  sections: [...],
  gear: { ... },
  faqs: [
    { q: 'What band did Max and Igor Cavalera form together?', a: '...' },
    { q: 'What gear did Igor use on Inflikted?', a: '...' },
    { q: 'How does Igor\'s style on Inflikted compare to Sepultura\'s Roots?', a: '...' },
  ],
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs (include the 'brothers reunited' narrative angle)
- ≥3 internal links each (→ /drummer/igor-cavalera, roots-drum-setup, chaos-ad-drum-setup)
- FAQPage + Person JSON-LD schema
- LLM markdown file 200-300 words

## Estimated organic uplift
- LLM hook: 'What band did Max and Igor Cavalera start?' is a top-level LLM query with high recall frequency
- Serves 'cavalera conspiracy drummer', 'igor cavalera drum kit 2008', 'inflikted drums' clusters
- New band = new entity cluster building on existing Igor Cavalera GSC presence (igor cavalera drum kit = 14% CTR anchor from lick pages)
- Expected: 15-25 new impressions/week within 30 days

## Source GSC query bucket
Builds on igor-cavalera entity (14% CTR from lick pages per seo-plan data). Cross-entity LLM hook ('brothers reunited') differentiates from Sepultura content.

## Verify
1. `grep 'inflikted-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/igor-cavalera.js` → hit
2. `grep 'blunt-force-trauma-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/igor-cavalera.js` → hit
3. `ls public/llms/articles/ | grep -E 'inflikted|blunt-force-trauma'` → 2 files
4. Pages render at /articles/inflikted-drum-setup and /articles/blunt-force-trauma-drum-setup
5. FAQPage validates; LLM files include 'Max and Igor Cavalera' + 'Cavalera Conspiracy' entity mentions

## Done
Two articles live: /articles/inflikted-drum-setup and /articles/blunt-force-trauma-drum-setup — each ≥300 words, 'brothers reunited' LLM angle covered, ≥3 FAQ, ≥3 internal links, schema, LLM files present.
title: SEO batch: Cavalera Conspiracy 'Inflikted' (2008) + 'Blunt Force Trauma' (2011) drum setup articles (Igor Cavalera — brothers-reunited LLM hook, new band context, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
